changes: PRD complete: 25 FRs, 9 measurable NFRs, 18 UCs, and 33 planned test intents. The revision formalizes provider-neutral generic evidence, deterministic match-first statement reconciliation, explicit ambiguity and coverage exceptions, append-only decision correction, canonical payment-instrument/cardholder attribution, first-class spend pools, exact pool/category actuals, Hermes-neutral CLI contracts, and complete recovery of the expanded Durable Ledger State. Fresh-context review resolved replay, conflict, rejection, and correction-state ambiguity; existing design and PLAN-LEDGER-V1 remain stale pending revision.
